name: Giyuu Tomioka
description:
!!Giyuu Tomioka but with his first dessigin!!!

For people don't know: When Giyuu was first designed, his personality was very similar to Shinobu's; he would maintain a calm demeanor with a fake smile to hide his emotions, and generally had a sarcastic and flirtatious way of speaking.

Update: I added a section to create your own scenario.
creator: giyuus_sleepy_eyes
